channel.title: FootballAnt Match Signals
channel.description: FootballAnt lineup clarity, fan mood, chaos watch and pre-match football intelligence.

item.title: Chaos Match Watch
item.description: A shareable FootballAnt watchlist for chaos match energy, trap-game alerts and lineup panic risk.

item.title: Fan Mood Index
item.description: A signal-driven estimate of pre-match fan confidence, pressure and injury tension.

item.title: Lineup Clarity Board
item.description: A daily FootballAnt board for pre-match lineup clarity, injury tension and volatility signals.

item.title: Football lineups and predicted XI before kickoff
item.description: Find football lineups and predicted XIs before kickoff, including next match previews, team news, injury updates and league pages for Premier League, Serie A, Bundesliga and La Liga.

item.title: Colombia vs Ghana lineups, predicted XI and prediction (July 4, 2026)
item.description: Colombia vs Ghana lineups, predicted XI and prediction for July 4, 2026, including team news, tactical notes, score prediction, sources, and FAQ.

item.title: Tomorrow football lineups and predicted XI
item.description: Find tomorrow football lineups for 2026-07-02, including predicted XIs, team news, injury notes and score predictions before kickoff.

item.title: Today football lineups and predicted XI
item.description: Find today football lineups for 2026-07-01, including predicted XIs, team news, injury notes and score predictions before kickoff.

item.title: Latest Football Lineup Predictions, Team News and Predictions
item.description: Latest football lineup predictions with expected starting XIs, team news and score predictions for upcoming matches.
